featureName: BUG-026-008 bounded synthesis extraction schema repair
title: Parsed schema-invalid synthesis output becomes permanent failure after one LLM call
source: operator-provided accepted-runtime logs plus source-path confirmation

scopeSummary.title: Repair one parsed schema-invalid synthesis response
scopeSummary.notes: Scenario-first bounded repair inside the existing synthesis extraction capability; source delivery stops before build/deploy.

transitionRequests.reason: Targeted shell E2E sets E2E_STACK_MANAGED=1 but does not boot the parent-owned stack, so test_synthesis.sh times out with service postgres is not running. Own under spec 031 live-stack test infrastructure.
transitionRequests.resolution: Targeted shared-stack shell E2E now pre-cleans, boots the disposable stack, passes SCN-004-001, and tears down through the parent lifecycle.

transitionRequests.reason: Dockerized full-unit tests mount the linked worktree but not the primary checkout Git metadata, so provenance and local-client tests fail with fatal not a git repository at the .git/worktrees pointer. Own under spec 031 test infrastructure.
transitionRequests.resolution: Tooling containers now receive read-only linked-worktree Git metadata plus GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0; the focused mount contract and full Go unit lane pass.

transitionRequests.reason: The repo CLI Python unit lane collects two explicit opt-in live tests as skips. Every changed BUG-026-008 test executes, but a literal zero-skip certification needs a supported required-test selector or category isolation owned by test infrastructure.
transitionRequests.resolution: Python unit collection excludes integration and live-Ollama categories with zero skips, while the required dead-letter parity test passes in the canonical integration lane.

transitionRequests.reason: Repo-wide format check names internal/config/release_trains_contract_test.go; git diff --exit-code proves it is byte-identical to origin/main and outside BUG-026-008's change boundary.
transitionRequests.resolution: Mechanical formatting was applied and the canonical repo-wide format check now passes.

transitionRequests.reason: The final broad E2E run is RED on five independent assistant/PWA and Drive findings documented in report.md; later failures after core/network disappearance are cascade noise and must not be over-filed.
transitionRequests.resolution: The five independent findings were assigned BUG-069-004, BUG-073-004, BUG-073-005, BUG-038-002, and BUG-038-003/BUG-031-009 packets and their fixes are consolidated in candidate b476198898f005ac5bad25510fcb9d90cbe50939. Aggregate evidence reconciliation remains a separate open governance action.

transitionRequests.reason: Review exact source candidate 5904f0266c2e9edd06db8fd8fb75794687dcf10e plus the committed packet evidence. Implement, focused test, regression, simplify, and stabilize ran in this invocation. Full all-package E2E remains operator-attested under the explicit no-rerun boundary, the focused runner retains its opt-in Ollama-agent skip, and security/audit remain diagnostic claims rather than terminal certification.

After validate/audit certification, build and deploy the pushed source through the signed delivery path and confirm accepted-runtime card-rewards synthesis repair; no deployment is authorized in this source-delivery session.
Repair the scopes.md change-boundary DoD shape and broken RED evidence anchor from existing report evidence only; do not rerun full E2E.
transitionRequests.resolution: scopes.md now contains the canonical Change Boundary DoD item and the pre-fix regression links to the existing RED evidence anchor.
